replies.msg:
Abstract:
N卡 vs 礦工 ， N卡hea 場被秒殺

雖然係預x咗一定係咁，但係都要話
我屌你啦 Nvidia

=====================

NVIDIA 為了冷卻顯示卡挖礦市場，在剛上市的 GeForce RTX 3060 顯示卡中加入「偵測挖礦算法限制」，偵測到掘礦動作時會直接 hashrate 算力減 50%，藉此希望能為遊戲玩家提供穩定的顯示卡供貨，傳聞 4 月上市的 GeForce RTX 3080 Ti 亦會採用相同做法，可惜不足一個月已被礦工們完美破解了，RTX3060 / RTX 3080 Ti 想便宜就難了。

https://www.hkepc.com/20162/%E8%B1%86%E8%85%90%E6%B8%A3%E7%A4%A6%E5%B7%A5%E5%B7%B2%E7%A0%B4%E8%A7%A3_NVIDIA_%E6%8C%96%E7%A4%A6%E9%99%90%E5%88%B6_GeForce_RTX_3060_%E7%AE%97%E5%8A%9B%E9%87%8D%E8%BF%94_45_MHs

NVIDIA GeForce RTX 30 Series Hash Rate Limiter Bypassed, GeForce RTX 3060 Shown Crunching Cryptocurrency at Full Mining Rate

Update: It seems like the mining algorithm used here wasn't Ethereum but Octopus which is a different cryptocurrency coin and based on an algorithm that NVIDIA might not have limited its hash rate for yet. So as of right now, the hash rate limiter remains in place but if other crypto-currencies can give out similar profits as ETH, then that doesn't stop miners from consuming the card for mining purposes.

https://wccftech.com/chinese-cryptocurrency-miners-allegedly-bypass-nvidias-geforce-rtx-3060-hash-rate-limiter-delivers-up-to-50-mh-s-in-ethereum/

NVIDIA GeForce RTX 30 Series Hash Rate Limiter Bypassed, GeForce RTX 3060 Shown Crunching Cryptocurrency at Full Mining Rate

Update: It seems like the mining algorithm used here wasn't Ethereum but Octopus which is a different cryptocurrency coin and based on an algorithm that NVIDIA might not have limited its hash rate for yet. So as of right now, the hash rate limiter remains in place but if other crypto-currencies can give out similar profits as ETH, then that doesn't stop miners from consuming the card for mining purposes.

https://wccftech.com/chinese-cryptocurrency-miners-allegedly-bypass-nvidias-geforce-rtx-3060-hash-rate-limiter-delivers-up-to-50-mh-s-in-ethereum/

replies.msg:
No, NVIDIA's GeForce RTX 3060 Crypto Mining Hash Rate Limiter Hasn't Been Hacked

The fact that the original image was cropped also led many to question the validity of the results. Many claimed that these cards weren't mining for Ethereum but used the Octopus algorithm for the alt-coin Conflux.

@I_Leak_VN was forced to admit that they were wrong about the hash rate limiter being cracked.

https://hothardware.com/news/no-nvidias-geforce-rtx-3060-crypto-mining-hash-limiter-hasnt-been-hackedy
